_README: TEMPLATE / PLACEHOLDER. The real concepts + definitions come from Andrew's Google Doc, which is currently private (403). Replace 'concepts' below with the real content once the doc is shared. 'styles' holds the 3 art directions; 'global_guidance' is appended to every prompt. Output is folder-per-style: images/concepts/<style>/<concept>__<definition>.png
global_guidance: Clean, modern presentation concept art. No text, no words, no logos, no watermarks. Strong central subject with generous negative space so it reads on a projected slide. Cohesive palette.

Editorial 3D Render.prompt: A polished editorial 3D render with soft studio lighting, subtle depth of field, tactile materials (matte plastic, brushed metal, frosted glass), and a calm premium tech aesthetic.

Minimal Line Art.prompt: Minimalist single-weight line-art illustration on a flat off-white background, limited two-color accent palette, lots of negative space, confident geometric shapes, flat vector feel.

Retro Risograph.prompt: A retro risograph-style print illustration with grainy texture, slight misregistration, a warm two-tone duotone palette, bold simple forms, and a hand-printed indie poster feel.
